attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15,
SORCTL.ORG_ID,
SORCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
SORCTL.REASON_CODE,
SORCTL.GLOBAL_ORDER_NUMBER,
SORCTL.QUANTITY_CREDITED,
SORCTL.QUANTITY_INVOICED,
SORCTL.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
SORCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
SORCTL.LINE_TYPE,
SORCTL.RULE_START_DATE,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT,
SORCTL.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2,
SORCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID,
SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
SORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE15,
SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,
SORCTL.DESCRIPTION,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8,
SORCTL.LINE_NUMBER,
SORCTL.TAX_RATE,
SORCTL.UOM_CODE,
SORCTL.CREATION_DATE,
SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE3,
SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE4,
SORCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
SORCTL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SORCTL.CREATE_DATETIME,
SORCTL.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SORCTL,
(SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES WHERE GLOBAL_NAME= 'OOD') NSSC
WHERE SORCTL.LINE_TYPE ='TAX' 
AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT '1' FROM  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL,  
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT,
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	WHERE SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	AND SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
   WHERE SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
   AND  SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL_1
   WHERE SATL_1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
   AND  SATL_1.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC1
	WHERE NSSC1.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME ) )
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EXORCTL
WHERE EXORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID)

SELECT 
NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END RU_TAX_CREDIT_AMOUNT,
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='DM' THEN SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT  
           WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='INV' THEN SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT   ELSE NULL END RU_TAX_DEBIT_AMOUNT,
NULL TAX_TYPE_CODE,
SORCTL.TAX_RATE TAX_RATE_PERCENTAGE,
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN 'CREDIT' 
WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' THEN 'DEBIT' 
WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN 'DEBIT' 
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END TAX_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
USER, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
USER,
COALESCE (NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE, 'UNKNOWN')   RELATED_TRANSACTION_LINE_TYPE  ,       
COALESCE(NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,-6666)  RU_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE (NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,-6666) RU_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE_KEY,
CAST(SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID AS BIGINT) SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE,
SORCTL.ACTION_CODE		ACTION_CODE  ,                 
'I'	DML_TYPE   
  FROM
(SEL 'OOD' AS GLOBAL_NAME, ST.* FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES ST
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC)=1)
SORCTL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
ON( SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON (SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT 
ON ( NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
ON (NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
AND NATIL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
 LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
ON (NATFL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
AND NATFL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
WHERE SORCTL.LINE_TYPE='TAX' and SORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID >0
UNION ALL 
SELECT 
NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN EORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END RU_TAX_CREDIT_AMOUNT,
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='DM' THEN EORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT  
           WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='INV' THEN EORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT   ELSE NULL END RU_TAX_DEBIT_AMOUNT,
NULL TAX_TYPE_CODE,
EORCTL.TAX_RATE TAX_RATE_PERCENTAGE,
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN 'CREDIT' 
WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' THEN 'DEBIT' 
WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN 'DEBIT' 
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END TAX_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
USER, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
USER,
COALESCE (NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE, 'UNKNOWN')   RELATED_TRANSACTION_LINE_TYPE  ,       
COALESCE(NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,-6666)  RU_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE (NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,-6666) RU_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE_KEY,
EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE,
EORCTL.ACTION_CODE		ACTION_CODE  ,                 
'I'	DML_TYPE   
  FROM
(SEL 'OOD' AS GLOBAL_NAME, ST.* FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES ST
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC)=1)
EORCTL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
ON( SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON (SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT 
ON ( NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
ON (NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = EORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
AND NATIL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
 LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
ON (NATFL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = EORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
AND NATFL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
where EORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID >0


UNION ALL

/* OOD FUSN Code*/
SELECT 
NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN SOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END RU_TAX_CREDIT_AMOUNT,
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='DM' THEN SOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT  
           WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='INV' THEN SOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT   ELSE NULL END RU_TAX_DEBIT_AMOUNT,
NULL TAX_TYPE_CODE,
SOFRCTL.TAX_RATE TAX_RATE_PERCENTAGE,
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN 'CREDIT' 
WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' THEN 'DEBIT' 
WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN 'DEBIT' 
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END TAX_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
USER, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
USER,
COALESCE (NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE, 'UNKNOWN')   RELATED_TRANSACTION_LINE_TYPE  ,       
COALESCE(NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,-6666)  RU_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE (NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,-6666) RU_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE_KEY,
SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE,
SOFRCTL.ACTION_CODE		ACTION_CODE  ,                 
'I'	DML_TYPE   
  FROM
(SEL 'OOD' AS GLOBAL_NAME, ST.* FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES ST
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC)=1)
SOFRCTL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
ON( SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON (SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT 
ON ( NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
ON (NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
AND NATIL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
 LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
ON (NATFL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
AND NATFL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
WHERE SOFRCTL.LINE_TYPE='TAX' and SOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID >0
UNION ALL 
SELECT 
NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN EOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END RU_TAX_CREDIT_AMOUNT,
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='DM' THEN EOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT  
           WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='INV' THEN EOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT   ELSE NULL END RU_TAX_DEBIT_AMOUNT,
NULL TAX_TYPE_CODE,
EOFRCTL.TAX_RATE TAX_RATE_PERCENTAGE,
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN 'CREDIT' 
WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' THEN 'DEBIT' 
WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN 'DEBIT' 
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END TAX_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE,

CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
USER,
COALESCE (NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE, 'UNKNOWN')   RELATED_TRANSACTION_LINE_TYPE  ,       
COALESCE(NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,-6666)  RU_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE (NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,-6666) RU_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE_KEY,
EOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE,
EOFRCTL.ACTION_CODE		ACTION_CODE  ,                 
'I'	DML_TYPE   
  FROM
(SEL 'OOD' AS GLOBAL_NAME, ST.* FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES ST
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC)=1)
EOFRCTL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EOFRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
ON( SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = EOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON (SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT 
ON ( NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
ON (NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = EOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
AND NATIL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
 LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
ON (NATFL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = EOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
AND NATFL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
where EOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID >0

SELECT 
NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END RU_TAX_CREDIT_AMOUNT,
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='DM' THEN SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT

WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' THEN 'DEBIT' 
WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN 'DEBIT' 
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END TAX_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE,

CAST(SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID AS BIGINT) SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE,
SORCTL.ACTION_CODE		ACTION_CODE  ,                 
'I'	DML_TYPE   
  FROM
(SEL 'OOD' AS GLOBAL_NAME, ST.* FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES ST
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC)=1)
SORCTL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
ON( SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON (SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT 
ON ( NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
ON (NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
AND NATIL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
 LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
ON (NATFL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
AND NATFL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
WHERE SORCTL.LINE_TYPE='TAX' and SORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID <0
UNION ALL 
SELECT 
NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN EORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END RU_TAX_CREDIT_AMOUNT,
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='DM' THEN EORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT

EORCTL.ACTION_CODE		ACTION_CODE  ,                 
'I'	DML_TYPE   
  FROM
(SEL 'OOD' AS GLOBAL_NAME, ST.* FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES ST
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC)=1)
EORCTL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
ON( SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID

 LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL

SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE,
SOFRCTL.ACTION_CODE		ACTION_CODE  ,                 
'I'	DML_TYPE   
  FROM
(SEL 'OOD' AS GLOBAL_NAME, ST.* FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES ST
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC)=1)
SOFRCTL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
ON( SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON (SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT 
ON ( NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
ON (NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
AND NATIL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
 LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
ON (NATFL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
AND NATFL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
WHERE SOFRCTL.LINE_TYPE='TAX' and SOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID <0
UNION ALL 
SELECT 
NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN EOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END RU_TAX_CREDIT_AMOUNT,
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='DM' THEN EOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT  
           WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='INV' THEN EOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT   ELSE NULL END RU_TAX_DEBIT_AMOUNT,
NULL TAX_TYPE_CODE,
EOFRCTL.TAX_RATE TAX_RATE_PERCENTAGE,
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN 'CREDIT' 
WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' THEN 'DEBIT' 
WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN 'DEBIT' 
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END TAX_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
USER, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
USER,
COALESCE (NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE, 'UNKNOWN')   RELATED_TRANSACTION_LINE_TYPE  ,       
COALESCE(NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,-6666)  RU_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE (NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,-6666) RU_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE_KEY,
EOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE,
EOFRCTL.ACTION_CODE		ACTION_CODE  ,                 
'I'	DML_TYPE   
  FROM
(SEL 'OOD' AS GLOBAL_NAME, ST.* FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES ST
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC)=1)
EOFRCTL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EOFRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
ON( SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = EOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON (SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT 
ON ( NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
ON (NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = EOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
AND NATIL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
 LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
ON (NATFL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = EOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
AND NATFL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
where EOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID <0

SELECT SOFRCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION
,SOFRCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID
,SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE15
,SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE3
,SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE4
,SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
,SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
,SOFRCTL.DESCRIPTION
,SOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT
,SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7
,SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_ORDER_NUMBER
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2
,SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT
,SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID
,SOFRCTL.LINE_NUMBER
,SOFRCTL.LINE_TYPE
,SOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
,SOFRCTL.ORG_ID
,SOFRCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
,SOFRCTL.QUANTITY_CREDITED
,SOFRCTL.QUANTITY_INVOICED
,SOFRCTL.REASON_CODE
,SOFRCTL.RULE_START_DATE
,SOFRCTL.TAX_RATE
,SOFRCTL.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE
,SOFRCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE
,SOFRCTL.UOM_CODE
,SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE1
,SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE2
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6
,SOFRCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
,SOFRCTL.CREATION_DATE
,SOFRCTL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,SOFRCTL.RULE_END_DATE
,SOFRCTL.SPLIT_KEY
,SOFRCTL.CREATE_DATETIME
,SOFRCTL.ACTION_CODE
,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SOFRCTL,
(SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES WHERE GLOBAL_NAME= 'OOD') NSSC
WHERE SOFRCTL.LINE_TYPE ='TAX' 
AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT '1' FROM  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL,  
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT,
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	WHERE SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	AND SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
   WHERE SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
   AND  SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL_1
   WHERE SATL_1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
   AND  SATL_1.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC1
	WHERE NSSC1.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME ) )
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EXORCTL
WHERE EXORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID)
